mapper.sql: SELECT b.id, b.station_id, s.name_zh_tw AS station_name_zh_tw, s.name_en AS station_name_en, b.user_id, u.username, u.email, b.created_at FROM [dbo].[user_station_bookmarks] b INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] s ON s.id = b.station_id INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = b.user_id
mapper.select:
WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( s.name_zh_tw LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[user_station_bookmarks] b INNER JOIN [dbo].[stations] s ON s.id = b.station_id INNER JOIN [dbo].[users] u ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL
AND ( s.name_zh_tw LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
WHERE b.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC
WHERE b.id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL

WHERE b.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND b.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.name_zh_tw LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stationName}, '%') ORDER BY b.created_at DESC, b.id DESC OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM [dbo].[user_station_bookmarks] WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT mt.max_station_bookmarks FROM [dbo].[users] u INNER JOIN [dbo].[membership_tiers] mt ON mt.id = u.membership_tier_id WHERE u.id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER}
